conditions.name: Tension Headache
conditions.explanation: Common headache from stress or tension.

conditions.name: Migraine
conditions.explanation: Can cause dull, throbbing pain with nausea.

data.action: Consider over-the-counter pain relief and rest in a quiet environment.
home_tips: Apply a cold compress to your forehead
warning_signs: Severe pain, visual disturbances, or sudden changes in sensation
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
